## CHAPTER I: THE SCENE
*Setting the Stage for the Eternal Coronation*

## CHAPTER II: THE LITURGY DECODED
*Hebrews 1:1-12, Verse by Verse Through the First Story*

### В§ VERSE 5 вЂ” The Begetting Formula

```
"THOU ART MY SON,
THIS DAY HAVE I BEGOTTEN THEE."

в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—

в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ "THIS DAY" в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ Not "from the beginning" в•‘
в•‘ Not "from before the foundation of the world" в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ THIS DAY в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ = The day the Atonement was completed в•‘
в•‘ = The day the Son sat down в•‘
в•‘ = The day the coronation occurred в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ The Atonement is a REBIRTH: в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ SON ENTERS в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ the Atonement в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ FATHER-SON EXITS в”Ђв”Ђ the Atonement в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ "This day have I begotten thee" = в•‘
в•‘ "NOW you are fully my Son вЂ” в•‘
в•‘ because NOW you have done what I did. в•‘
в•‘ NOW you have bled as I bled. в•‘
в•‘ NOW you know what I know." в•‘
в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ SPOKEN BY: TO: в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ The Great Israel в†’ The Great Jehovah в•‘
в•‘ (after the Alpha Atonement) в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ Our Heavenly Father в†’ Jesus Christ в•‘
в•‘ (after Calvary/Resurrection) в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ [Future Father] в†’ [Future Son] в•‘
в•‘ (after future Atonement) в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ THE FORMULA NEVER CHANGES. в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ
```

```
therefore GOD, EVEN THY GOD,
hath ANOINTED THEE
with the oil of gladness
```

### В§ The Universal Anointing Connection

```
в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—

в•‘ в•‘

в•‘ is a SHADOW of this ceremony. в•‘
в•‘ в•‘
в•‘ ALPHA ANOINTING: в•‘
в•‘ Great Israel в†’ Great Jehovah в•‘
в•‘ (Hebrews 1:9) в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ в–ј в•‘
в•‘ SHADOWS ACROSS TIME: в•‘
в•‘ в”‚ в•‘
в•‘ Samuel anoints Saul (1 Samuel 10:1) в•‘
в•‘ Samuel anoints David (1 Samuel 16:13) в•‘
в•‘ Moses anoints Aaron (Leviticus 8:12) в•‘
в•‘ Every temple anointing в•‘
```

## CHAPTER IV: THE COMPLETE CORONATION PROTOCOL
*The Full Ceremony Assembled*

### В§ The Liturgy in Sequence

```
THE ETERNAL CORONATION PROTOCOL
(Hebrews 1:1-12 + Mosiah 15)

STEP 1: THE ATONEMENT
в”‚ The Son descends.
в”‚ The Son bleeds.
в”‚ The Son dies.
в”‚ The Father restrains.
в”‚ The Son rises.
в”‚
STEP 2: THE ENTHRONEMENT (v.3)
в”‚ "Sat down on the right hand"
в”‚ The Son takes His seat.
в”‚ The descent is over.
в”‚
STEP 3: THE APPOINTMENT (v.2)
в”‚ "Appointed heir of all things"
в”‚ The Father declares the Son heir
в”‚ of everything that exists.
в”‚
STEP 4: THE BEGETTING (v.5)
в”‚ "Thou art my Son, this day
в”‚ have I begotten thee"
в”‚ The Father declares the Son
в”‚ reborn through the Atonement.
в”‚
STEP 5: THE ANOINTING (v.9)
в”‚ "God, even thy God, hath anointed thee
в”‚ with the oil of gladness above thy fellows"
в”‚ The oil is poured.
в”‚ The Melchizedek ordination is conferred.
в”‚ The sceptre of righteousness is given.
в”‚
STEP 6: THE CREATIVE COMMISSION (v.10)
в”‚ "Thou hast laid the foundation of the earth"
в”‚ The Son is now authorized to CREATE.
в”‚ The blood bought the authority.
в”‚
STEP 7: THE ETERNAL DECLARATION (v.12)
в”‚ "Thou art the same,
в”‚ and thy years shall not fail"
в”‚ The Father declares the Son eternal.
в”‚ The worlds will pass. He will not.
в”‚
STEP 8: THE MOSIAH 15 TRANSFORMATION
в”‚ The Son is now BOTH Father and Son.
в”‚ He holds both titles simultaneously.
в”‚ He is one God вЂ” the very Eternal Father.
в”‚
```
